description_long: This is a modern filing cabinet with a rectangular, dark-colored body and a contrasting reddish-brown flat top surface. The front features a double-door compartment with metallic bar handles on the left and three vertically stacked drawers with matching handles on the right. The drawers are partially open, revealing their boxy interiors, while the doors appear to conceal a larger storage space. The cabinet stands on a short base, and the sides are finished in a lighter gray tone, providing a two-tone visual effect. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for storing documents or office supplies. The materials suggest a combination of wood or engineered wood for the structure and metal for the handles.
description: A two-tone filing cabinet with a reddish-brown top, dark body, double doors, and three drawers with metallic handles. The design is modern and functional, ideal for organized storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors with metallic handles and three drawers with matching handles on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet and the overhanging reddish-brown top.
description_view_2: Rear or opposite side view showing a plain light gray panel and the open drawers extending outward.
description_view_3: Other side view displaying the solid light gray panel and the overhanging top.
